ogTitle: Dumaresq Valley vs Dumbudgery: Climate Safety

heading: Dumaresq Valley vs Dumbudgery — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dumaresq Valley, New South Wales and Dumbudgery, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dumbudgery has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Dumaresq Valley (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dumaresq Valley or Dumbudgery safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dumaresq Valley has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Dumbudgery scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dumaresq Valley scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Dumbudgery scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dumaresq Valley or Dumbudgery?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dumbudgery has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
